context_text: <A> [ well see ] that's what we kinda left but we're still very close to them and still see { them } / <B> [ yeah ] / <A> even though they're back in michigan / <B> no / <A> and the closest ones are twelve hours away but we still see them and they're still as dear to our heart as they were then / <B> yeah / <A> and we just don't see them on a monthly basis or couple of times a month like we used to that's all / <B> yeah
